test.create_query: CREATE TABLE lazy_final_perf ( part UInt8, key UInt64, version UInt64, category UInt8, payload String ) ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree(version) PARTITION BY part ORDER BY key SETTINGS index_granularity = 256
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT 0, number, 1, if(number < 50000, 1, 0), repeat('x', 200) FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT 1, number + 1000000, 1, 0, repeat('x', 200) FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT 2, number + 2000000, 1, 0, repeat('x', 200) FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT 3, number + 3000000, 1, 0, repeat('x', 200) FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT 4, number + 4000000, 1, 0, repeat('x', 200) FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT 5, number + 5000000, 1, 0, repeat('x', 200) FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT 6, number + 6000000, 1, 0, repeat('x', 200) FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT 7, number + 7000000, 1, 0, repeat('x', 200) FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT 8, number + 8000000, 1, 0, repeat('x', 200) FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT 9, number + 9000000, 1, 0, repeat('x', 200) FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_perf SELECT toUInt8(number * 100 / 1000000), number * 100, 2, if(number * 100 < 50000, 1, 0), repeat('y', 200) FROM numbers(100000)
test.query: SELECT count(), max(cityHash64(payload)) FROM lazy_final_perf FINAL WHERE category = 1 SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_lazy_final = 0
SELECT count(), max(cityHash64(payload)) FROM lazy_final_perf FINAL WHERE category = 1 SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_lazy_final = 1, max_rows_for_lazy_final = 10000000
